name: Google Sheets Lead Collector & Email Alert
description: Monitors a Google Sheet for new row entries and automatically sends an email notification via Gmail.
plainEnglishSummary: Monitors your Google Sheet every minute for new rows.
Formats the new row data into a clean email message.
Sends an instant email notification to your inbox.

requiredUserInputs.label: Google Sheet ID
requiredUserInputs.setupGuide: Open your Google Sheet, look at the URL in your browser, and copy the string between /d/ and /edit!

requiredUserInputs.label: Recipient Email
requiredUserInputs.setupGuide: Enter the email address where notifications should be sent.

params.subject: New Lead Added in Google Sheets
